title: SRS Repository Registry (ext:federation)
description: Local file listing the SRS document repositories known to this system or team. May be standalone or part of a federated hierarchy via childRegistries.

registryId.description: Stable identity for this registry file.

entries.description: Known repositories. No two entries may share the same repositoryId (Invariant 61).

childRegistries.description: Paths or URLs to subordinate RepositoryRegistry files. Resolution is depth-first; cycles must be detected and halted (Invariant 62).

repositoryId.description: Stable identity key; matches the repository's own repositoryId.

title.description: Human-readable name; for display and disambiguation only.

location.description: Local path or URL to the repository root. Absent = ID-only citation (location unknown).

lastSeen.description: When this entry was last confirmed reachable.
